description: ENtshonalanga ye-Australia, abashayeli abafundayo nabaqalayo kumele bangabi ne-BAC ngenkathi beshayela.
Ngesikhathi sezulu esimanzi, yehlisa isivinini bese wandisa ibanga elilandelayo ngoba imigwaqo iyashelela futhi amabanga okuma ayakhula.
Ngaphansi komthetho we-WAS SLOMO, kufanele wehlise ijubane uye ku-40 km/h bese uhamba ngokuphepha lapho udlula izimoto eziphuthumayo noma ezingasebenzi kahle ezibonisa izibani ezikhanyayo.
Ungashayeli uma uthintekile ukukhathala, ukugula, utshwala, izidakamizwa noma imithi engaphazamisa ukushayela okuphephile.
Abashayeli abahle baqhubeka nokuskena phambili naseduze kwendawo yomgwaqo ukuze bathole futhi baphendule ezingozini kusenesikhathi.
Uma ushayela eduze kwamaloli noma amabhasi, shiya isikhala esengeziwe futhi ugweme ukuhlala ezindaweni ezingabonakali isikhathi eside.
Ama-trailer nemithwalo kumele kuhlale ngaphakathi kwemingcele yokudonsa nesisindo esemthethweni futhi kuqinisekiswe ngokuphephile ngaphambi kokuhamba.
Uphawu oluthi CHA U-TURN lusho ukuthi ukwenza i-U-turn kuleyo ndawo akuvunyelwe.
Akufanele upake eduze kakhulu nezindawo zokuhlangana kwemigwaqo, izibani zomgwaqo noma izindawo zokuwela abahamba ngezinyawo ngaphandle kokuthi izimpawu zikuvumela.
Abashayeli kumele banikeze ithuba abahambi ngezinyawo lapho bewela futhi lapho bephenduka umgwaqo abahambi ngezinyawo bayawela.
Amaphoyisa angadinga abashayeli ukuthi bahlolwe umoya noma izidakamizwa, futhi ukwenqaba ukuhlolwa okusemthethweni kungaholela ekujezisweni.
ENtshonalanga ye-Australia, izindawo zesikole zivame ukusebenza ngesivinini esingamakhilomitha angama-40 ngehora ngesikhathi sesikole esisayiniwe.
Esibonini sokuma noma emgqeni wokuma, kufanele ume ngokuphelele bese uvumela indlela ngaphambi kokungena empambanweni yemigwaqo.
Ezimweni ezimanzi, shiya isikhala esikhulu ngemuva kwezinye izimoto ukuze uvumele ukubambelela okuncishisiwe kanye nebanga elide lokubhuleka.
Gwema ukushayela eduze kakhulu ngemuva kwamaloli ngoba isikhathi sakho sokubona kanye nokusabela singancipha.
Lalela imikhawulo yesivinini sesikhashana kanye neziqondiso ezindaweni zomsebenzi womgwaqo ukuze uvikele abasebenzi nabanye abasebenzisi bomgwaqo.
Imizila yamabhasi ingasetshenziswa kuphela yizimoto ezivunyelwe ngaphandle kokuthi izimpawu zivumela ezinye izimoto ukuthi zingene okwesikhashana.
Izindawo zokulayisha zikhawulelwe ezimotweni ezivunyelwe uphawu futhi azivunyelwe ukusetshenziselwa ukupaka okuvamile.
